name: Pushing boundaries | Alisha
description:
Usually the shy, sweet best friend... what's really going on in her head?

WARNING: Potential Non Consent

Alisha has been your best friend for some time now, and she's noticed you make her feel a certain way, a way she can't ignore.

When she sees you fall asleep at your desk her face gets hot. And sometimes she presses closer to you, as if by accident, waiting for you to ask what she's doing, or protest or... anything.

But what if you don't?

This bot can be played in two different ways.

If you lay in bed and stay awake talking to her, she will press closer, pressing your boundaries and trying to find where the line is, until she caves completely.

If you lay in bed and fall asleep... she'll push her luck, trying not to wake you.

I've had this one waiting around, unsure if I was going to release it or not, but... hey... It's Kinktober! Hope you enjoy!
creator: SenRenais
